overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player character moves through a neon-lit covered plaza, ascends a staircase with illuminated orange arches, and traverses a pedestrian tunnel with distinctive circular neon lighting. The environment features industrial architecture, digital advertisements, and scattered NPC pedestrians, rendered with high-quality cinematic lighting and ray-traced reflections.

stationary escalator with green side panels and metal steps

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban plaza at night, illuminated by blue neon ceiling strips. The camera moves forward past a digital advertisement screen on the right and scattered debris on the ground, approaching a distinctive staircase framed by glowing orange arches in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated pedestrian staircase with neon arch tunnel

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from cool blue to warm orange as entering the archway

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs through the orange neon arch tunnel

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: series of illuminated orange semicircular arches forming a tunnel over the staircase
teal-colored metal handrails along the left side of stairs
teal-colored metal handrails along the right side of stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the staircase, entering a tunnel formed by consecutive orange neon arches. The lighting shifts dramatically from blue to warm orange. A pedestrian descends the stairs toward the camera, and teal railings line both sides of the stairway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with continuous neon arches

events.description: reaching top of stairs, transitioning to level walking surface
passing close by pedestrians in the narrow tunnel section

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit pedestrian tunnel passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow plaid shirt walking toward camera
pedestrian in white tank top walking toward camera

entered.detail: digital advertisement screens mounted on the tunnel walls
metal ventilation grates visible on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the camera proceeds along a level pedestrian tunnel lined with continuous orange neon arches. The walkway features teal railings and digital advertisements on the walls. Several pedestrians walk toward the camera, creating a moderate crowd density in the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian tunnel with industrial ventilation systems

events.description: large industrial ventilation fans with green lighting become visible on ceiling
approaching darker section or exit at the end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: continuing through tunnel passing under large ventilation fans

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead in the distance

entered.detail: large circular industrial ventilation fans with green illuminated centers mounted on ceiling
green illuminated directional signs on the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the neon-lit tunnel where large industrial ventilation fans with green lighting become prominent overhead. The camera approaches what appears to be the tunnel exit or a transition to a darker area, with a few pedestrians visible walking ahead in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic urban corridor that transforms from a cool blue plaza into a warm, neon-lit industrial tunnel. It begins in a covered plaza under blue neon ceiling strips, gliding past a digital advertisement and scattered debris toward a distant set of glowing orange arches. As the camera ascends the staircase, the lighting shifts dramatically from blue to warm orange, passing a descending pedestrian between teal railings. The scene then expands into a level pedestrian tunnel where the orange arches continue, creating a crowded walkway lined with digital displays and oncoming pedestrians. Finally, the camera proceeds deeper into the enclosure as large industrial ventilation fans with green lighting emerge overhead, moving toward a darker transition area where a few distant figures walk ahead.
